title: Brotein Secrets.xcconfig — OpenAI + Supabase keys (REDACTED)
html:
Xcode view of Brotein's Secrets.xcconfig showing OPENAI_API_KEY and the Supabase project URL (mhhgiidnbhgmlpgghgkt.supabase.co) + SUPABASE_ANON_KEY (JWT). All key material redacted in this summary. The file's own comment header says "should never be committed to git" — confirmed by the parallel-slice DEHARDCODING-API-KEYS roadmap line in the same week's todos.

brotein · xcode · supabase · openai api

related.label: Brotein roadmap tabs — DeHardcoding API Keys, RevenueCat, TikTok, food-icon spec list
Brotein Xcode crash — SupabaseClient init nil-unwrap (Secrets.xcconfig REDACTED)
